heading: Omitted
label: 1727 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for implementation of the Indian Child Welfare Act in jurisdiction over Indian child custody proceedings, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 96–420, § 894 Stat. 1795Oct. 10, 1980
